chapter_title.en: Chapter on Days and Times Recommended for Travel and Days and Times Disliked for Travel

text: 2401 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمْرَانَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مَنْ سَافَرَ أَوْ تَزَوَّجَ وَ اَلْقَمَرُ فِي اَلْعَقْرَبِ لَمْ يَرَ اَلْحُسْنَى.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2401 - It is narrated by Muhammad ibn Humran from his father, from Abu Abdullah (as):
"Whoever travels or marries while the moon is in Scorpio will not see goodness."
